creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Bad diff.  Here's the good one:

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile	Tue Mar 27 21:36:44 2007
+++ ./munger/Makefile	Tue Apr 17 02:42:26 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	4.124
+PORTVERSION=	4.125
  CATEGORIES=	lang
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo	Tue Mar 27 21:36:44 2007
+++ ./munger/distinfo	Tue Apr 17 03:26:40 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (munger-4.124.tar.gz) = 9d82c512361d8a37d48253d9bba0fd07
-SHA256 (munger-4.124.tar.gz) = 
807c8e8a2efce4db46bf8fcdaf0ef0e5765543e3f9ebcd9418f58ad84e13ec5e
-SIZE (munger-4.124.tar.gz) = 304075
+MD5 (munger-4.125.tar.gz) = 0da0e4b617bd0a1aaf868fa8feb9c2be
+SHA256 (munger-4.125.tar.gz) = 
ed98fcbe1172dea8dcd5ddc0909ac0756b6ded5c1dfb5973d09d8fccdd4b02a1
+SIZE (munger-4.125.tar.gz) = 303662
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist ./munger/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist	Tue Mar 27 21:36:44 2007
+++ ./munger/pkg-plist	Tue Apr 17 02:42:31 2007
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
  bin/munger
-lib/libmunger.so.17
+lib/libmunger.so.18
  %%DKNS_BIN%%
  %%DATADIR%%/echo.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/msh.munger
